Spanish UI. Leadiva Mint Pastel. Flat Institutional. 

STRICT LAYOUT FROM WIREFRAME {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}:
- LEFT SIDEBAR: White, right border 1px #d5e8e0. Three zones separated by thin horizontal dividers:
  1) TOP: Official black line-art rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_22}} + wordmark 'Leadiva'.
  2) MIDDLE: Header 'Oportunidades anteriores' + list of 3 text rows (e.g., 'Modernización Red Ferroviaria', 'Suministro Hardware', 'Servicios Cloud'). Soft mint #d9eedb hover. NO 'Inicio' or 'Oportunidades' navigation tabs.
  3) BOTTOM: User circle initials 'DM' + name 'Diego Murillo Correa'.

- MAIN CONTENT: Background #f4faf6. Contains ONE white detail panel (rounded-md, 1px border #d5e8e0, no shadow).
- DETAIL PANEL CONTENT: Stacked vertically with clean whitespace:
  1. Titulo: Bold large text 'Modernización del Sistema de Gestión de Residuos - Alcaldía de San Salvador'
  2. Descripcion: 4 lines of realistic text about the project scope and technical requirements.
  3. Sitio web: Clickable teal #05aba9 link 'https://www.comprasalsv.gob.sv/oportunidad/lic-2024-001'
  4. Fecha limite: '20/12/2024'
  5. Monto: '$1,250,000.00 USD'
- Small 'PÚBLICO' chip near the title.
- Lots of clean whitespace below the fields.

FORBIDDEN: Dense tables, filter bars, marketing footers, suggestion pills, multiple cards. Just one focused detail panel.
## Available Images
You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them
by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS
`background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new
placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's
Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role.

- {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_22}}
  Description: Leadiva Logo Official
  Dimensions: 1024x1024
  Aspect Ratio: 1.00
- {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}
  Description: Wireframe /oportunidades/[resultadoId]
  Dimensions: 1024x758
  Aspect Ratio: 1.35
","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/d8109bc6d6064ad199052e00733b2623","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.
","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"}},"version":"1"}}],"theme":{}}},{"text":"I have created the detailed opportunity screen for route **/oportunidades/[resultadoId]**, strictly following the institutional "Leadiva Flat" aesthetic and your specific wireframe instructions.

### Design Highlights:
- **Strict Wireframe Layout**: The interface is divided into a clean white sidebar and a spacious main content area using the project's signature mint pastel palette.
- **Simplified Sidebar**: Following the three-zone requirement, I've integrated the official black line-art rocket logo, the "Oportunidades anteriores" list, and the user profile at the bottom, removing all standard navigation tabs.
- **Focused Detail Panel**: The main workspace features a single, high-contrast white panel for the opportunity details. Information is presented in a vertical stack (Title, Description, Website, Deadline, and Amount) with generous whitespace to ensure maximum readability and professional clarity.
- **Institutional Styling**: Adhered to the flat design principles—no shadows, no gradients, and #d5e8e0 borders for a clean, enterprise-ready look.

Does this detail view align with your expectations, or would you like to adjust the data fields or spacing?"},{"suggestion":"Añadir un botón de 'Exportar a PDF' arriba del título"},{"suggestion":"Hacer la descripción más extensa y con viñetas"},{"suggestion":"Cambiar a modo oscuro institucional"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.prompt:
Create a desktop screen for route /oportunidades/[resultadoId] — Detalle. Spanish UI. Leadiva Mint Pastel. Flat Institutional. 

STRICT LAYOUT FROM WIREFRAME {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_4}}:
- LEFT SIDEBAR: White, right border 1px #d5e8e0. Three zones separated by thin horizontal dividers:
  1) TOP: Official black line-art rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_22}} + wordmark 'Leadiva'.
  2) MIDDLE: Header 'Oportunidades anteriores' + list of 3 text rows (e.g., 'Modernización Red Ferroviaria', 'Suministro Hardware', 'Servicios Cloud'). Soft mint #d9eedb hover. NO 'Inicio' or 'Oportunidades' navigation tabs.
  3) BOTTOM: User circle initials 'DM' + name 'Diego Murillo Correa'.

- MAIN CONTENT: Background #f4faf6. Contains ONE white detail panel (rounded-md, 1px border #d5e8e0, no shadow).
- DETAIL PANEL CONTENT: Stacked vertically with clean whitespace:
  1. Titulo: Bold large text 'Modernización del Sistema de Gestión de Residuos - Alcaldía de San Salvador'
  2. Descripcion: 4 lines of realistic text about the project scope and technical requirements.
  3. Sitio web: Clickable teal #05aba9 link 'https://www.comprasalsv.gob.sv/oportunidad/lic-2024-001'
  4. Fecha limite: '20/12/2024'
  5. Monto: '$1,250,000.00 USD'
- Small 'PÚBLICO' chip near the title.
- Lots of clean whitespace below the fields.

FORBIDDEN: Dense tables, filter bars, marketing footers, suggestion pills, multiple cards. Just one focused detail panel.
## Available Images

screens.title: /oportunidades/[resultadoId] — Detalle

outputComponents.text:
I have created the detailed opportunity screen for route **/oportunidades/[resultadoId]**, strictly following the institutional "Leadiva Flat" aesthetic and your specific wireframe instructions.

### Design Highlights:
- **Strict Wireframe Layout**: The interface is divided into a clean white sidebar and a spacious main content area using the project's signature mint pastel palette.
- **Simplified Sidebar**: Following the three-zone requirement, I've integrated the official black line-art rocket logo, the "Oportunidades anteriores" list, and the user profile at the bottom, removing all standard navigation tabs.
- **Focused Detail Panel**: The main workspace features a single, high-contrast white panel for the opportunity details. Information is presented in a vertical stack (Title, Description, Website, Deadline, and Amount) with generous whitespace to ensure maximum readability and professional clarity.
- **Institutional Styling**: Adhered to the flat design principles—no shadows, no gradients, and #d5e8e0 borders for a clean, enterprise-ready look.

Does this detail view align with your expectations, or would you like to adjust the data fields or spacing?

outputComponents.suggestion: Añadir un botón de 'Exportar a PDF' arriba del título
Hacer la descripción más extensa y con viñetas
